allow: Bash(uv run python -c "from pydantic_ai import Agent; print\([m for m in dir\(Agent\) if ''instru'' in m.lower\(\)]\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from pydantic_ai import Agent; help\(Agent.instrument_all\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from pydantic_ai._instrumentation import InstrumentationSettings; help\(InstrumentationSettings\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from pydantic_ai.agent import InstrumentationSettings; help\(InstrumentationSettings\)")
Bash(uv run python -c "from pydantic_graph import Graph, GraphRunResult; print\(GraphRunResult.__module__, GraphRunResult.__qualname__\)")
Bash(uv run ruff format src/ tests/)
